visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with a beige bucket hat and a cream-colored dress stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She holds a green carton of Jasmine Green Milk Tea and speaks directly to the camera with an animated expression. Behind her, industrial shelves are stacked with various beverages and milk cartons. (2) The camera cuts to a close-up of the store shelf, revealing many empty cardboard boxes where the milk tea is sold. A price tag displaying $149 is visible on the shelf edge. The woman's hand points toward the empty spaces to emphasize the product's popularity and high demand. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room where two women sit at a grey table. One woman wears a blue top, while the first woman now wears a beige beret. They have glasses of milk tea and multiple cartons on the table. The lighting is warm and domestic with various plush toys and items in the background. (4) Close-up shots focus on the back of the milk tea carton, specifically highlighting the ingredients list. Graphic overlays with arrows and boxes point to the text mentioning milk powder. Later, a comparison shot shows another product's label, 'I-Mei Hou Milk Tea,' emphasizing differences in ingredient composition. (5) The two women engage in a taste test, drinking through straws and making expressive faces. They gesture frequently with their hands while discussing the flavor. Various variety-show style text graphics and emojis appear around them to punctuate their reactions and final verdict on the drink.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你知道現在最紅的是什麼嗎? (2) [Logo]: @. [Subtitle]: Threads現在每個人都在喝這個. [Variety]: 茉莉綠奶茶. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們回去試看看. (4) [Subtitle]: 他被拿很多欸. 你看剩下這樣而已. (5) [Subtitle]: 其他貨架都是滿的. 而且他補了一大區都是他. (6) [Subtitle]: 可見他有多猛. [Variety]: 他有多猛. (7) [Subtitle]: 究~竟好不好喝. [Slogan]: 來勢洶洶! (8) [Subtitle]: 在Threads上爆紅的. [Variety]: 超神飲料. (9) [Subtitle]: 茉莉綠奶茶. 喝起來的感覺是... (10) [Variety]: 並! 日! 通! (11) [Subtitle]: 一瓶只要50元. 一組三罐149. (12) [Subtitle]: 價格真的很划算. 這麼大瓶. (13) [Subtitle]: 可是我們覺得他的甜度有點高. 喝起來像茶凍的味道. (14) [Subtitle]: 如果你很喜歡茶凍. 到他變成液體. (15) [Subtitle]: 你也愛的話. 你可以試試看喔. [Variety]: 液體茶凍? (16) [Subtitle]: 我是覺得. 他被封神封得太高了. [Variety]: 他被封神封得太高了. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以你對他的期望會太高. 你喝起來就會. (18) [Variety]: 失落的越大. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒錯. 但如果你對他沒有期望. [Variety]: 可能你會喜. (20) [Subtitle]: 可能你會喜歡. 因為很便宜. (21) [Subtitle]: 但以他的價錢來說. 他真的算是便宜的. (22) [Subtitle]: 其實有一些陷阱喔. 你看他的含乳量60%. (23) [Slogan]: 光泉鮮乳添加. (24) [Subtitle]: 但你最後看看他的成分. (25) [Subtitle]: 他的乳含量是在茶粉後面喔. (26) [Subtitle]: 他最多的是水跟奶粉喔. 他的含乳量是奶粉的含乳量. (27) [Variety]: 生乳量比奶粉多喔~ (28) [Subtitle]: 我自己個人認為. 義美厚奶茶更有辨識度一些. (29) [Subtitle]: 你們覺得呢? 你們更喜歡哪一款? (30) [Slogan]: 引戰啦...

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a bucket hat/beret and a white dress; the other has long dark hair and a blue off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse with stacked pallets and beverage shelves; later a domestic living room with a grey sofa and desk items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female vocals open the video with a rapid-fire question. The background music is a quirky, upbeat electronic track with a bouncy synthesizer melody and light percussion. A sharp digital 'ding' sound effect punctuates the visual appearance of text, establishing a professional yet playful production style. (2) As the narrator describes the product's popularity on social media, the vocal pitch remains high with varied intonation. A quick 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a camera transition. The acoustic environment shifts slightly as the recording moves between the store and a domestic setting, but the master track remains studio-clean. (3) A second female voice joins in a conversational, high-arousal tone. Frequent post-production sound effects like bubble 'pops' and comic 'stings' are synchronized with on-screen variety graphics. The BGM maintains a steady 124 BPM tempo, providing a rhythmic framework for the rapid speech delivery. (4) A male voice sample interjects with an exaggerated, comedic 'reveal' tone, shouting 'Super Ordinary!' with a slight echo effect. The main speakers continue their detailed review, with their voices clearly prioritized in the mix above the low-volume background music. The production ends with a final energetic vocal sign-off and a sharp cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Investigation -> Experience -> Analysis -> Comparison -> Verdict.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest review of a trending Costco milk tea, debunking social media hype by examining its ingredients and flavor profile. The video contrasts the product's high demand with its 'ordinary' taste and high milk powder content.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The critical analysis of ingredients and the 'super ordinary' verdict suggest an independent review rather than an endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social-media style edit that effectively uses contrasting locations and critical analysis to engage the audience.
